cards.title: Ask My AI
cards.description: Chat with an AI trained on my real experience and projects

paragraphs: I'm a Data Scientist and ML researcher with an MSc from Utrecht University, focused on interpretable, human-centered AI and interactive visualization.
Ask my AI assistant about my research at Utrecht, industry experience, projects, or background — it's grounded in my CV and writings.

chat.initialMessage: Hey there! 👋 I'm Ziv's AI assistant, I have access to his writings, and life insights. Feel free to ask and explore about his professional path or personal growth!
